name: MEDIMARKET
message: MEDI-MARKET is a new chain of pharmacies and parapharmacies offering, for the first time in Belgium, 1,000 m² dedicated to health. Our innovative concept offers customers personalized advice from specialists and a wide range of products in the health care, natural medicine, cosmetics, nutrition and baby care sectors. Website: www.medi-market.beRevenue : $164MAddress: 2 Blvd Anspach 2, Brussels, Brussels Capital, BelgiumPhone Number: +32 22260120
